product: A10i (A10i Wide and A10i Focus — same enclosure, two directivity variants)

electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 66 Hz - 20 kHz (Focus); 67 Hz - 20 kHz (Wide), usable bandwidth -10 dB
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 140 dB for A10i Focus, 137 dB for A10i Wide ([A10] preset); peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4. Max SPL with LA2Xi differs — see LA2Xi spec sheet.
electroacoustic.directivity: Fixed enclosure coverage 10° (Focus) or 30° (Wide); Panflex L-Fins set horizontal pattern to 70° or 110° symmetric, or 90° asymmetric (35°/55° or 55°/35°)
electroacoustic.components: 2-way passive constant-curvature WST. LF: 1 x 10" cone driver (bass-reflex, L-Vents). HF: 1 x 2.5" diaphragm neodymium compression driver on DOSC waveguide with L-Fins.

operating_modes: Single passive enclosure driven from one amplifier output via the [A10] preset
[A10_FI] preset variant for filtered/dual-input routing (OUT 1-2 on IN A, OUT 3-4 on IN B)
Panflex directivity (70° / 110° / 90° asymmetric) selected mechanically at the L-Fins; the same [A10] preset drives all fin settings and both Wide and Focus enclosures

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point terminal block with push-in connection; the + and - terminal sets are interchangeable as IN or LINK
connection.sealing: Connector sealing plate with cable gland for weather-protected installs
connection.breakouts: custom 2-point speakON cable (2.5 mm2 gauge) to bare-wire cable available for connection from L-Acoustics amplified controllers

physical.weight_note: 19 kg / 42 lb (A10i Focus); 18 kg / 40 lb (A10i Wide)
physical.dimensions_mm: Focus: 569 W x 350 H x 294 D (approx, mm); Wide: 569 W x 347 H x 180 D (approx, mm) — front face ~569 wide, depth varies between variants
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; finishes: dark grey brown Pantone 426 C, pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

modes: Flown vertical line source (A10i Wide and/or Focus combined)
Wall- or ceiling-mounted with fixed or adjustable site angle
Single-box point source for front-fill, delay, or fill duty
deployment.max_per_flown_array: Same A10i-LIFT pickup point applies to radial arrays of up to 6 enclosures; arrays of 7+ enclosures follow a separate procedure (see owner's manual)
deployment.inter_element_angles: Vertical line-source inter-element angle 0° to -25° in 2.5° steps via LINK plates; A10iFOCUS-LINK adds a 5° splay between two Focus boxes; bracket/tilt site angles range -30° to +30°
rigging_accessories: A10iWIDE-LINK / A10iFOCUS-LINK and matching ENDLINK plates
A10i-ULINK II / A10iKS21i-ULINK II, KS21i-SLINK / -ENDSLINK plates
M6 inserts for rigging plates/accessories, M8 inserts for A10-Ui, one DIN580-compatible M8 safety insert

usage: Medium-throw installation line source rated for coverage out to about 35 m, well suited to theaters, houses of worship, clubs, schools, and sports venues.
Each box is a single passive 8-ohm load needing one amplifier channel: budget up to 12 per LA12X, 16 per LA7.16i, 8 per LA4X or LA2Xi (single-ended), but only 2 per LA2Xi in bridged (BTL) mode.
Mix Wide (30°) and Focus (10°) enclosures in one column to tailor SPL mapping and throw, and use Panflex L-Fins to set horizontal coverage to 70°, 110°, or 90° asymmetric without changing presets.
Pair with KS21i subwoofers to reinforce low end and extend the system response down to roughly 31 Hz for fuller-range program material; on its own A10i favors vocal and light-LF music content.

Deploy flown vertically, in radial arrays via A10i-LIFT (keep arrays to 6 boxes per shared pickup point), ground-stacked, on KS21i, or wall/ceiling-mounted; a single box also works as a configurable-directivity front-fill or delay.

Load the [A10] preset for plug-and-play operation; [A10_FI] is available for filtered/dual-input routing. IP55 rating plus the sealing-plate cable gland make it suitable for protected outdoor and demanding install environments.
